personality_one_liner: A magazine-like, warm, and content-led experience that lets the craftsmanship and storytelling of handmade products take center stage.

spacing.rule: Magazine-like spacing rhythms with generous vertical breathing room, intentional empty space, and minimal density. Ensure comfortable padding for touch targets.

do's: Use solid surface backgrounds instead of glass to maintain the matte, organic editorial feel.
dont's: Do not use blur or glassmorphism as it clashes with the Editorial/Print aesthetic.

screens.name: Home (Customer)
screens.purpose: Showcase featured artisans and trending handmade products using visually rich editorial layouts.

states.empty: Empty table illustration with 'No products found in this category.'
states.error: Readable error message with a 'Try Again' button.

screens.layout: Use a full-width featured hero image (artisan working) with a gradient scrim and white serif text at the bottom. Below, use a 2-column grid for products with generous vertical spacing and a 'Featured Collections' horizontal scrolling section. Hide header on scroll.

screens.name: Product Detail Page
screens.purpose: Tell the artisan's story and showcase product details with minimal distraction, leading to checkout.

states.loading: Skeleton loading for image and text lines.
states.error: Error fetching product details, retry button.

screens.layout: Minimal header. Full-width, high-res image carousel at the top. Above the fold: Breadcrumbs, Title, Price, and Sticky 'Add to Cart' button pinned at the bottom. Below the fold: Artisan story, material details, and reviews. Thumb-friendly layout.

screens.name: Seller Dashboard
screens.purpose: Allow artisans to manage their listings, view AI-generated descriptions, and track orders.

states.empty: Illustration of an empty studio with 'List your first creation.'

screens.layout: Clean, list-based layout using surfaceSecondary cards for products. A prominent 'Add Product' primary CTA pinned at the bottom. AI Description generator is accessible via a clear secondary action button.

screens.name: Admin Approval Queue
screens.purpose: Streamline the review process for new handmade products with clear approve/reject actions.

states.empty: Illustration of a clean desk with 'All caught up! No pending approvals.'

screens.layout: Single column list of pending products. Each card shows the image, artisan name, and two action buttons: Approve (brandPrimary) and Reject (secondary), opening a bottom sheet for feedback.

hero_artisan.alt: Artisan working in studio with black shirt

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Editorial Mobile LIGHT personality. Do not use heavy drop shadows, rounded bubbles, or glassmorphism. Keep radii at sm (6px) or 0px.
Typography is key: Use Playfair Display for all major headings and DM Sans for body text. Enforce a max font weight of 500 across the entire app.
Colors: Strictly avoid any blues, purples, or indigos. Stick to the warm off-white (surface) and muted rust/terracotta (brand) palette provided.
For the Customer Home screen, use the 'hero_artisan' image with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) so white text over it is fully legible.
For the Product Detail Page, minimize the header and ensure the 'Add to Cart' button is sticky at the bottom, outside the scroll view.
The Seller product listing form must include an obvious 'Generate with AI' action for descriptions.
When displaying products or artisans, favor real PNG images and photos over placeholder initials.
Ensure all data screens (like Admin Approval Queue or Seller Dashboard) have full-screen Loading, Empty, and Error states designed.
Implement haptics on primary actions (e.g., Add to Cart, Approve/Reject product, adding to wishlist) utilizing the provided haptics block.
